COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-05-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
J. Michael Anthony, Esq. for Appellant/Defendant Bob Korman, who is also present.
John C. Golden and Pandora Golden, Respondents/Plaintiffs are present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.
Attorney Anthony is sworn. Appellant/Defendant's CCP 170.6 challenge of Judge Ulmer is ruled as untimley as the witnesses had already been sworn.

No new exhibits are introduced.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk:M. Smith, Not Reported (503)
